turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Hi, I'm interested in the three-bedroom units on Main Street.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Absolutely! I'd be happy to help you with that. Are you looking to rent or buy the three-bedroom unit on Main Street?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “I want to buy, but I'm looking for a rent.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Got it, you're interested in renting. No worries! Could you let me know what your budget range is for the rental?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “I don't know how much is the average pay in this street.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Sure, I can give you an idea! Typically, the average rent for a three-bedroom on Main Street ranges from about $450 to $600 per week. Does that kind of range work for you?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “$600? Oh my god, that's too expensive.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: I understand, it can definitely be a bit pricey. Would you like me to look into some more affordable options, maybe in a different area or with different amenities?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Okay, then change the area, I mean a little bit far from the main street, but not too far.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Absolutely, that

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “You know?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Alright, that sounds good! I can definitely find some options a bit further out but still convenient. Do you have any specific preferences, like proximity to public transport or certain amenities?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “I need a car park.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Got it, a car park is definitely important. I'll keep that in mind. Is there a particular number of parking spaces you need, or is one space enough?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Just one space, please, because I have a... one car.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Perfect, that makes it easier. Alright, I’ll look for some three-bedroom rentals in a nearby area with at least one parking space. Anything else that you’d like to add or consider?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Is the property furnished or unfurnished?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: That’s a great question! Would you prefer a furnished property, or are you looking for something unfurnished so you can bring your own furniture?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Furnished is better to me.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Got it, furnished it is! That definitely helps narrow it down. I’ll keep that in mind as well. Is there a specific move-in date you have in mind?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “No, but I just need a practical furnished.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Absolutely, that makes sense! I’ll focus on properties that are practically furnished and have the essentials. If there's anything else you think of, just let me know!

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Please, find the place as cheap as possible. I don't have much budget.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Of course, I’ll definitely keep affordability in mind and try to find the best value options for you. I’ll make sure to balance both cost and the essentials. If you have any other preferences, just let me know!

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “I don't want the first floor.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Got it, no ground-level units. I’ll focus on properties above the first level for you. That definitely helps narrow it down further. Let me know if there's anything else I can do!

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “And I don't like kids, so...”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: No worries, I’ll

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “No playground around. My unit is better to me.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Understood, I'll make sure to look for places that aren't near playgrounds or children-focused areas. That definitely helps refine the search. If there’s anything else you'd like to add, just let me know!

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Now that's all, but what documents I need to provide?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Great question! Usually, you'll need proof of income, a photo ID, and sometimes a credit check. Additionally, a rental application form and references might be required. If you have any specific questions about that, just let me know!

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “And credit check, is that important?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Yes, it can be pretty important for landlords to assess your financial reliability. It helps them understand your credit history and ensure you can meet the rent payments. But if you have any concerns, we can definitely discuss alternatives as well.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “What alternative is there?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Well, some landlords might accept a higher security deposit, or a co-signer, or even proof of steady income and references instead of a credit check. It really depends on the landlord and the property. If you’d like, we can explore those options further.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “So, prove my income is important, right?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Exactly, yes! Showing proof of income helps confirm that you can comfortably afford the rent. Usually, that can be recent pay stubs, bank statements, or even a letter from your employer. It definitely helps the process go smoothly.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Okay, then I'll be prepared. Thank you.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: You're very welcome! If you have any more questions or need any more help along the way, just let me know. I’m here to help!

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “When can I see the unit?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: I can definitely arrange that for you! Let me know your availability, and I’ll coordinate with the property owner. We can set up a viewing at a time that works best for you.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Okay.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Great! Just let me know when you’re available, and I’ll take care of the rest. Feel free to reach out anytime, and I’m happy to help.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “How about this Saturday?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Saturday sounds perfect! I’ll go ahead and arrange everything for you, and I’ll confirm the details shortly. If anything comes up in the meantime, just let me know!

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Alright, thank you, then see you this Saturday.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: You’re very welcome! I’m looking forward to it. See you on Saturday, and have a great day until then!

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Bye-bye.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Bye for now! Take care, and I’ll see you soon!
